author: PostPollux
description: Supercharges html5 video player controls for local videos – horizontal scrubbing, vertical volume adjustment, configurable double tap, long press for fast forward and more! Note: Won't effect embeded players like e.g.the Youtube player. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: PostPollux
manifest.description: Supercharges html5 video player controls for local videos – horizontal scrubbing, vertical volume adjustment, configurable double tap, long press for fast forward and more! Note: Won't effect embeded players like e.g.the Youtube player.
manifest.name: VideoControlsEnhancer
